extension.name: RAG Azure Builder
extension.description: Spec Kit extension for onboarding and operating an Azure RAG stack with guided workflows.
extension.author: Sertxito

commands.name: speckit.rag-azure-builder.onboarding
commands.description: Guide full RAG onboarding from prerequisites to first query.

commands.name: speckit.rag-azure-builder.azure-setup
commands.description: Plan and apply Azure infrastructure setup for RAG.

commands.name: speckit.rag-azure-builder.index
commands.description: Index documents into Azure AI Search with validation checks.

commands.name: speckit.rag-azure-builder.chat
commands.description: Define and validate chat retrieval and response behavior.

commands.name: speckit.rag-azure-builder.cost
commands.description: Assess and adjust cost tier, observability, and budget alerts.

hooks.prompt: Run Azure RAG onboarding checklist before tasks?
hooks.description: Validates prerequisites and recommended tier before implementation

config.name: rag-azure-builder-config.yml
config.description: Runtime configuration for tiers, region, and data sources
